atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports dizziness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports blood in urine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient experienced similar pain to previous kidney stones two years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's pain started on the right side and has shifted to the left.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's pain has been present for the last four days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's pain is now constant and quite severe.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient feels dizzy and lightheaded, particularly when exerting himself.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient notes some blood in his urine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been diligent with his migraine medication (imitrex).

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been making dietary changes for his reflux.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some body aches.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the body aches to favoring his back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tenderness to palpation on the right-hand side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tenderness in the right lower quadrant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the abdomen feels tender.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation on the right-hand side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness in the right lower quadrant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals the abdomen feels tender.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart sounds are clear.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure is slightly elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dragon shows a blood pressure of 142/88.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dragon shows a creatinine of 1.3.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms, particularly the back pain, tenderness, and elevated creatinine, suggest a recurrence of kidney stones.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a CT scan without contrast of the abdomen and pelvis to evaluate for kidney stones.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Prescribe ultram 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain.
